message:
refactor(manifest): consolidate duplicate cycle detection implementations

- Remove local detectDependencyCycles from parser.ts (-58 lines)
- Import and use detectDependencyCycles from validate.ts instead
- Adapt error format from validate.ts to types.ts ValidationError
- The validate.ts implementation is more comprehensive:
  - Finds ALL cycles (not just the first one)
  - Provides richer error info (code, context, cyclePath)
  - Has proper deduplication via sorted cycle key
  - Better documented with JSDoc

Closes: agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-akf8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
